title: YVtils Discord
description: The Discord Module out of the YVtils-SMP plugin as single plugin
body:
![Plugin Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2VysTIcY/images/49530c126acd79cfc8910687bc58e02922c5d73e.png)

# Features

- Tutorial: [Discord Module Setup Guide](https://youtu.be/YQiYSjEcdMk)
<iframe width="500" height="300" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/YQiYSjEcdMk" title="Discord Module Setup Guide | YVtils SMP & YVtils DC | A Step-by-Step Guide" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- Chat Sync

  ![You want to chat with players on your server without joining it? With Chat Sync you can write in a discord channel and start a conversation with all players on the server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/edf0531dd70219060e19cce64b950dbda24c5137.png)

- Minecraft Server Stats

    ![Minecraft Server Stats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/a1236bf2d7c73a307c13c2059c1b8771c9a339b8.png)
    ![Minecraft Server Stats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/3e3878ef0586631de3798069bfd3f5b0c2ff2c2f.png)

- Console Sync

    ![Console Sync](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/3ac4d9fb20ba844d17f1f3958f7fe3aa1366a8a6.png)

- Whitelist with Discord

![Status](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/01813e22083d4710f146a17cadaeade7a0a7ec52.png)

# This Plugin does **not** support Spigot or versions < 1.19

# Disclaimer
This plugin is a standalone version of the discord module from the [YVtils-SMP Plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/yvtils_smp)
